title: Haydcraft
description: Yet another modpack of my creation. Just meant to be fun and cute mostly!
body:
This modpacks primary goal is longevity, not via massive mods, time-consuming progression, or quest books. Rather through an enhancement of minecrafts core gameplay, via creative projects and builds. With more structures and unique world generation allowing for exploration, giving the player a break from their projects. See below for a general overview of the sort of mods that enable the experience! 

While a majority of the mods are QOL, there are some notable exceptions. With Cliff under a Tree for world generation and the Dungeons and Tavern series for structures. Then some mob additions with mods such as Friends&Foes, Creeper Overhaul, Critters and Companions. With Farmers Delight Refabricated and multiple extensions adding a plethora of food options. Fabric Seasons creates different growing seasons, and makes different parts of the world feel fresh, while also furthering exploration in winter thanks to sleds from Snow Spirit. Lastly, you can experience future minecraft updates with Vanilla Backport and Perfect Parity!

The scope of the modpack is increasing with each update. Now with many more Delight expansions, the Let's Do series, and Origins!
